_comment: ContextGO configuration template.
Copy this file, rename it (e.g. contextgo.config.json), and set
CONTEXTGO_CONFIG_PATH to point at it, or place it at the default
location: ~/.contextgo/config.json.
All ${VAR} placeholders are expanded from the environment at startup.
String values that begin with '${' are treated as env-var references.
Omit a section entirely to use built-in defaults.

storage._comment: Paths for the local vector store and the AGFS backing store.

agfs._comment: Agent File System backing store; port is used only for the local HTTP adapter.

_comment: Dense embedding model used for semantic search.
Supported providers: litellm, openai, ollama.
Set dimension to match the model's actual output dimension.
Vision-language model used for image/screenshot ingestion.
Set to null to disable VLM processing entirely.
Default search behaviour; all values can be overridden per-request.
mode: 'fast' (BM25 only) | 'semantic' (dense only) | 'hybrid'.
hybrid_alpha: weight of dense score in hybrid mode (0.0 = BM25 only,
1.0 = dense only).
Memory viewer HTTP server settings.
token: set a non-empty value to enable bearer-token auth.
Required when host is not 127.0.0.1 / localhost / ::1.
Background daemon polling and ingestion settings.
Setting an interval to 0 disables the corresponding scan.

monitors._comment: Enable monitors selectively. All disabled by default.

_comment: Antigravity passively ingests completed AI session transcripts.
ingest_mode: 'final_only' | 'incremental'.
busy_ls_threshold: skip ingestion when active process count >= N.
Optional remote sync to a self-hosted or cloud ContextGO backend.
Disabled by default; set enabled=true and configure base_url + api_key.

logging._comment: Log verbosity: DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR | CRITICAL
